---
title: "Governance Audit Report"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
    toc: false
---

# Executive Summary

**Project**: {{< meta project_title >}}  
**Version**: {{< meta project_version >}}  
**Status**: {{< meta governance_complete >}}

## 1. Governance Health
The automated self-audit score for this syllabus is **{{< meta ai_governance.scoping_health >}}**.

## 2. Policy Summary
{{< meta ai_governance.policy_summary >}}

# Audit Trail

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Source Tool | {{< meta audit_trail.source_tool >}} |
| Builder Version | {{< meta audit_trail.builder_version >}} |
| Transformation Integrity | {{< meta audit_trail.transformation_integrity >}} |
| Manifest SHA256 | {{< meta audit_trail.manifest_sha256 >}} |

---
*This report was automatically generated from ecosystem metadata.*
